name: jemalloc
description: jemalloc is a general purpose malloc(3) implementation that emphasizes fragmentation avoidance and scalable concurrency support. Tebako fork for DwarFS: builds without je_ prefix on all platforms for Folly compatibility. The posix_memalign conflict with GCC's mm_malloc.h is resolved by removing the posix_memalign declaration from jemalloc_protos.h.in on Linux (libc provides the function).
